title: Anthropic Just Released Claude Sonnet 5 and it's VERY IMPRESSIVE!
summary: Cole Medin provides a positive reaction to Anthropic's release of Claude Sonnet 5, highlighting it as an impressive model for the cost. The video frames Sonnet 5 within a broader discussion of AI's transformative potential and the creator's focus on mastering AI agents.
writeup: Cole Medin reacts to Anthropic's release of Claude Sonnet 5, presenting a positive first assessment of the model. The main point is that Sonnet 5 delivers impressive capability relative to its cost. Medin situates the release within a wider discussion of AI's transformative potential and his ongoing focus on mastering AI agents.
